title: Genesos 00
wikitext:
[]: Genesos 0:0'...             Quote Post by bp32 » Fri Jan 28, 2005 9:28 am Since I am requesting stuff....does anybody have a copy of Genesis 0:0'. I think it is an old vhs tape that gave a behind the scenes view at the making of the show. Was wondering if anyone had fansubbed it or at least formated into a video file...anyone holding?? :)

[]: Re: Genesos 0:0'...             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Jan 28, 2005 9:57 am bp32 wrote: Since I am requesting stuff....does anybody have a copy of Genesis 0:0'. I think it is an old vhs tape that gave a behind the scenes view at the making of the show. Was wondering if anyone had fansubbed it or at least formated into a video file...anyone holding?? :)

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Jan 28, 2005 11:38 am Until I can put it online (still have to clear space) you can try, if you have broadband, to emule it. ed2k://|file|Renewal.of.Evangelion.Extras.Disc.%5BRLP%5D.avi|641157644|070766518A8443A06917791D64A82DB6|/ If I can't post ed2k links here, please admin or mod, delete it. I didn't mean to infringe any rule or cause any problem.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 28, 2005 11:52 am I just sent Monkey the Renewal Bonus Disc. If we're lucky, Aaron will be able to use his charismatic charm to convince some fansubbing outfit or another to sub the whole thing for us geeks. Would be nice, no?

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Fri Jan 28, 2005 11:59 am Reichu wrote: I just sent Monkey the Renewal Bonus Disc. If we're lucky, Aaron will be able to use his charismatic charm to convince some fansubbing outfit or another to sub the whole thing for us geeks. Would be nice, no?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Jan 28, 2005 4:12 pm I'm not sure, that's the first time I hear of that program. Just do this test: click on the link, if it adds a file to your download queue then you can, if not, emule is your choice. As for starters on sub: I already subbed the alternate live action sequence that comes in the bonus disc.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jan 28, 2005 5:00 pm Here's the dealie. I now have the Renewal extra disc. it has some potentially interesting stuff. Some Q&A with some of the staff and cast, Anno, Sadamoto, Miyamura, Mitsuishi, etc. I will see about the possibility of getting this fan subbed. If not, I'll create a torrent and make it available that way. I certainly don't have the disc space to make it available for direct download, unless of course I chop it up into individual pieces, and throw out some of the stuff that you may well have seen already. Stay tuned.

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Sat Jan 29, 2005 2:16 am it boggles my mind that five fansub groups will release fansubs of shows like Air and other shitty new anime, but we can't find a single translator for all this Eva stuff...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jan 29, 2005 12:20 pm It does, doesn't it? Cross your fingers and say your hail Marys, cause if I get a undergraduate research award in March, I'm going to have a lot of stuff translated for your consumption. That's when all those rare Eva books of mine are going to come in handy. There's a bunch of promising articles and interviews in them, just begging to be translated.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 29, 2005 2:52 pm So... you're not going to look into the fansub outfits?

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Sat Jan 29, 2005 3:11 pm Please, please find someone to fansub the Renewal extras...I am dying to see the making of stuff--I know, I know, those who have seen it might think it isn't anything special, but you always want what you can't have :)

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Sat Feb 05, 2005 2:32 am Otaprince wrote: it boggles my mind that five fansub groups will release fansubs of shows like Air and other shitty new anime, but we can't find a single translator for all this Eva stuff...

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sat Feb 05, 2005 3:17 pm Otaprince wrote: it boggles my mind that five fansub groups will release fansubs of shows like Air and other shitty new anime, but we can't find a single translator for all this Eva stuff...
